register.title: Lease Expiry — Vacancy Risk
register.description: Current tenancy expires Oct 2026. Tenant requesting 5–8% rent reduction; failure to agree could result in 2–3 month vacancy.

register.title: HK Luxury Residential Decline
register.description: TST luxury residential market has declined ~14% from 2021 peak; further deterioration driven by emigration and reduced mainland buyer demand.

register.title: HK Government Cooling Measures
register.description: Government stamp duty or rental regulation changes could impact rental yield and capital value.

register.title: Tenant Damage / Rent Default
register.description: Tenant default or property damage risk; mitigated by 2-month security deposit held.

register.title: HKD Peg — No FX Risk
register.description: HKD pegged to USD; no material FX risk for USD-reporting trust.

scenarios.name: Tenant Vacates — 3-Month Void Period
scenarios.verdict: Manageable — 3 months vacancy costs ~$12,700 USD; re-let at HKD 31,000/mo recovers within 6 months.

scenarios.name: HK Market Decline 15% — Valuation Impact
scenarios.verdict: Asset unencumbered — no LTV covenant risk. Capital loss of $409K unrealised; hold strategy appropriate given family trust horizon.

mitigationPlan.action: Engage Savills HK to advise on renewal strategy; obtain market comp data to counter tenant rent reduction request
